extractionMethod: The complete two-feature official response was parsed and deterministically pretty-printed; no JSON value, object-key order, array order, feature, or coordinate was changed.

sourceSemantics.apnRole: APN normalization and property reconciliation input; not a unique raw-row key
sourceSemantics.geometryRole: Cadastral parcel boundary in CRS84; not a rooftop, building entrance, or address point
sourceSemantics.duplicateEvidence: Both official features have APN 12769001 but distinct objectid values and geometries
sourceSemantics.subset: Both rows are Palo Alto examples; Palo Alto remains a subset of the county denominator
sourceSemantics.redistribution: The official metadata exposes public read access but declares no explicit redistribution license; later publication eligibility remains a separate decision
